preprocessorDirectives.comment: Remove all data fields from base, source is better, keep only CAT stuff and f001
Copy data from source to base

mergeConfiguration.comment #1: These should not be any fields to merge
mergeConfiguration.comment #2: List indicators that don't block merge here. Non-filing indicators do not prevent field merge (their support is hard-coded). They are mainly listed here as an example.
mergeConfiguration.comment #3: If one indicator has value, and the other has not, it does not necessarily mean mismatch
